posts.text: Alternate broker for long term investing — Yes I recently registered there for my FIL. groww.in Groww API for Algo Trading - Portfolio, Orders, Data & Indices Faster Trading, Realtime Data, Supercharged APIs for your algo trading needs. Read the documentation to get started.

posts.text: Alternate broker for long term investing — Do they have api ? I will probably also look for another broker in future for stocks investing with CG to avoid mixing it with ST trading on Z. Have an old Fyers account but not sure if i will use them for larger amounts.

posts.author: Sankalp
posts.text: Alternate broker for long term investing — I don’t think opening another broker really changes much if the goal is still just investing. You could probably just explore something like a secondary demat within Zerodha itself and keep long-term holdings there,keeps things simpler without adding another account.

posts.author: Nabarun_Chakraborty
posts.text: Alternate broker for long term investing — I dont do trading. i have only one demat. I use zerodha for long term investing. i buy stocks weekly for investing purpose. i like zerodha for their clean user interface , no ads and good support portal. I am planning to open another demat account for investing. Kindly suggest another broker.
